# Careers
Birds of all feathers welcome—join the flock and soar with Sparrow.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/67220ffe36d9614e9fc0dc64_Vectors-Wrapper.svg)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/69a6e07cfbe9755d2f02b853_DSC01434_cropped%20Large.jpeg)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/672b58ac7fc1bcb577f98549_Vectors-Wrapper.svg)
## Soar with the Sparrows
At Sparrow Quantum, we believe that collaboration is the key to unlocking the full potential of quantum technology. Join our flock and become a part of the movement to transform the future of computing and communication—we always welcome a fast-flying bird.
## Sustainability Data Analyst
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/672b58ac7fc1bcb577f98549_Vectors-Wrapper.svg)
This role will be critical in managing, analyzing, and reporting sustainability data.  

## Student assistant
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/672b58ac7fc1bcb577f98549_Vectors-Wrapper.svg)
We are looking for dedicated students with a passion for quantum to join us. You will be working closely together with our team on different projects. Together we will form the work around you and your expertise.  

## Quantum Photonics Engineer
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/672b58ac7fc1bcb577f98549_Vectors-Wrapper.svg)
Have you ever considered pursuing a career in a fast-growing start-up company, allowing for direct influence on critical decisions and developments? Can you imagine yourself working on commercializing unique quantum photonic technology in close cooperation with one of the leading research centers in the world?  

## Physicist specialized in quantum optics
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/672b58ac7fc1bcb577f98549_Vectors-Wrapper.svg)
If you share our passion for delivering a real-world impact through the development of unique quantum photonic technology and possess the skills, we believe are essential for future Sparrows, we invite you to explore the exciting opportunity of joining our team by submitting your application today.  

### Open positions
#### There are no open positions right now
#### Don’t see any relevant positions?
We’d still love to hear from you!  
Submit your résumé below.  

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/672b58ac7fc1bcb577f98549_Vectors-Wrapper.svg)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/672b58ac7fc1bcb577f98549_Vectors-Wrapper.svg)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/67220ffe36d9614e9fc0dc64_Vectors-Wrapper.svg)
### Our Guiding Lights
![Inclusive environment icon](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/672b6859990e4f1087364512_Vectors-Wrapper.svg)
#### Inclusive Environment 
By merging diverse backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences, we grow stronger and broaden our horizons. Sparrow Quantum is a place where everyone belongs and feels completely at home on the team. 
![Long-term journey icon](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/672b685a6029368905c4d9eb_Vectors-Wrapper.svg)
#### Patience in the Journey 
Our journey together is a marathon, not a sprint. While we strive to accelerate the quantum future, we recognise that breakthrough research takes time and commitment. We never take shortcuts that compromise our scientific integrity, honesty, or the trust of our customers.  

![Continuous learning & growing icon](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/672b685b508a803329ee4108_Vectors-Wrapper.svg)
#### Continuous Learning & Growing 
Intellectual curiosity and continuous learning are precious values at Sparrow Quantum. We encourage our team to attend talks, conferences, and professional development events that enrich your understanding and fuel your career growth. 
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/67220ffe36d9614e9fc0dc64_Vectors-Wrapper.svg)
#### The Sparrow Nest
Collaborate with world-class researchers at our headquarters, located at Symbion in Frederiksberg. Reach out to schedule a visit—we'd love to give you a tour. [Contact us. ](https://sparrowquantum.com/contact)
### The Sparrow Nest
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/67220ffe36d9614e9fc0dc64_Vectors-Wrapper.svg)
![Sparrow Quantum team in lab](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/69a6e06064476f90e2243d6a_DSC01811%20Large.jpeg)
![Sparrow Quantum headquarters at the Niels Bohr Institute](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/68c4037b79aafcff781ae15a_Symbion%20Frederiksberg.jpeg)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/69a6e242e0ed69af5f209ce6_DSC01475%20Large.jpeg)
[![Sparrow Quantum logo with blue gradient color](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6721f6603ca1e674e1539db4/6728a5364585a64f06e02a6e_Logo%20-%20Left%20Aligned.svg)](https://sparrowquantum.com/careers)

Birds of all feathers welcome—join the flock and soar with Sparrow.

At Sparrow Quantum, we believe that collaboration is the key to unlocking the full potential of quantum technology. Join our flock and become a part of the movement to transform the future of computing and communication—we always welcome a fast-flying bird.
